---
title: "👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: none
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Fira+Code:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="../shared/_styles.css">
---

```{=html}
<div id="top-navbar">
  <div id="nav-title">
    🇩🇪 German A1 Language
    <span class="subtitle">Beginner Study Notes · <a href="../index.html" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);text-decoration:none">← Back to Home</a></span>
  </div>
  <!-- AUTO-NAV-START -->
<div id="nav-tabs">
    <a class="nav-tab" href="alphabet.html">🔤 Alphabet</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="colors.html">🎨 Colors</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="communication.html">🗣️ Communication</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="countries.html">🌍 Countries & Languages</a>
    <a class="nav-tab active" href="family.html">👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="game.html">🎮 Noun Flashcard Game</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="grammar.html">📐 Grammar</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="hobbies.html">🎯 Hobbies</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="komposita.html">🔗 Komposita</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="modal-verben.html">🔧 Modal Verben</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="numbers.html">🔢 Numbers</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="personal.html">👤 Personal Info</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="school.html">🏫 School</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="time.html">📅 Time & Calendar</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="verbs.html">📝 Verbs — German Verb Reference</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="w-fragen.html">❓ W-Fragen & Ja/Nein-Fragen</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="wetter.html">🌤️ Das Wetter — The Weather</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="flashcards.html">🃏 Flashcard Game</a>
</div>
<!-- AUTO-NAV-END -->
  <div id="nav-dropdown"></div>
</div>
<script src="../shared/_app.js"></script>

<div id="main-content">
  <div class="hero">
    <div class="flags">🇩🇪 🇦🇹 🇨🇭</div>
    <h1>👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family</h1>
    <p>German A1 Study Notes · Beginner Level · <a href="../index.html" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.75)">← All Topics</a></p>
  </div>
```

<!-- ═══════════════════════════ SECTION: Family ═══════════════════════════ -->

::: {#sec-family }

```{=html}
<div class="topic-banner">
  <div><span class="de-article">die</span><span class="de-word">Familie</span></div>
  <div class="pron-word">[fah-MEE-lee-eh]</div>
  <div class="en-word">Family</div>
</div>
```

## Family Members {#sub-familymembers}

```{=html}
<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fdf4ff,#ede9fe);border-radius:16px;padding:1.4rem;margin:1rem 0;border:2px solid #e9d5ff;">
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:10px;">
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #3b82f6">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#1d4ed8">👨 der Vater / Papa</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">father · die Eltern (parents)</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #ec4899">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#be185d">👩 die Mutter / Mama</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">mother · die Eltern (parents)</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #3b82f6">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#1d4ed8">👦 der Bruder</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">brother · die Geschwister (siblings)</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #ec4899">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#be185d">👧 die Schwester</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">sister · die Geschwister (siblings)</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #3b82f6">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#1d4ed8">👴 der Großvater / Opa</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">grandfather · die Großeltern</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #ec4899">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#be185d">👵 die Großmutter / Oma</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">grandmother · die Großeltern</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #3b82f6">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#1d4ed8">👦 der Sohn</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">son · die Kinder (children)</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #ec4899">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#be185d">👧 die Tochter</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">daughter · die Kinder (children)</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #3b82f6">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#1d4ed8">🤵 der Ehemann</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">husband · das Ehepaar (couple)</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #ec4899">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#be185d">👰 die Ehefrau</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">wife · das Ehepaar (couple)</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #3b82f6">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#1d4ed8">🧑 der Onkel</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">uncle · die Verwandten (relatives)</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #ec4899">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#be185d">👩 die Tante</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">aunt · die Verwandten (relatives)</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #3b82f6">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#1d4ed8">🧑 der Cousin</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">male cousin</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #ec4899">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#be185d">👩 die Cousine</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">female cousin</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #3b82f6">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#1d4ed8">🧑 der Neffe</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">nephew</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:.7rem 1rem;border-left:4px solid #ec4899">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#be185d">👧 die Nichte</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#6b7280">niece</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Possessive Sentences {#sub-familysent}

| German | English |
|--------|---------|
| Das ist meine Mutter. | This is my mother. |
| Das ist unser Vater. | This is our father. |
| Das ist dein Bruder. | This is your brother. |
| Das sind ihre Eltern. | These are their parents. |
| Das ist sein Onkel. | This is his uncle. |
| Das ist mein Buch. | This is my book. |
| Das ist unser Haus. | This is our house. |
| Das ist meine Brille. | This is my glasses. |
| Das ist mein Kind. | This is my child. |

---

## Possessives with Nouns — Class Practice {#sub-possnouns}

::: {.callout-note}
The possessive ending changes based on the **gender of the noun** it describes.  
**mein** (der/das) · **meine** (die / plural) — same pattern for dein, sein, ihr, unser, euer, Ihr.
:::

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin:1rem 0;">

  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:11px;padding:.7rem 1rem;display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:baseline;border:1.5px solid #e9d5ff;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(124,58,237,.07)">
    <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250;font-size:.96rem;min-width:24px">1.</span>
    <div>
      <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250">Mein Name ist Anna.</span>
      <span style="margin-left:.6rem;font-size:.8rem;color:#3b82f6;font-weight:700;background:#eff6ff;border-radius:5px;padding:1px 7px">der Name</span>
      <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#6b7280;margin-top:2px">My name is Anna.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:11px;padding:.7rem 1rem;display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:baseline;border:1.5px solid #e9d5ff;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(124,58,237,.07)">
    <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250;font-size:.96rem;min-width:24px">2.</span>
    <div>
      <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250">Wie ist deine Telefonnummer?</span>
      <span style="margin-left:.6rem;font-size:.8rem;color:#ec4899;font-weight:700;background:#fdf2f8;border-radius:5px;padding:1px 7px">die Telefonnummer</span>
      <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#6b7280;margin-top:2px">What is your phone number?</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:11px;padding:.7rem 1rem;display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:baseline;border:1.5px solid #e9d5ff;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(124,58,237,.07)">
    <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250;font-size:.96rem;min-width:24px">3.</span>
    <div>
      <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250">Meine Adresse ist Temple Straße, Kandy.</span>
      <span style="margin-left:.6rem;font-size:.8rem;color:#ec4899;font-weight:700;background:#fdf2f8;border-radius:5px;padding:1px 7px">die Adresse</span>
      <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#6b7280;margin-top:2px">My address is Temple Street, Kandy.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:11px;padding:.7rem 1rem;display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:baseline;border:1.5px solid #e9d5ff;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(124,58,237,.07)">
    <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250;font-size:.96rem;min-width:24px">4.</span>
    <div>
      <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250">Mein Haus ist groß.</span>
      <span style="margin-left:.6rem;font-size:.8rem;color:#10b981;font-weight:700;background:#ecfdf5;border-radius:5px;padding:1px 7px">das Haus</span>
      <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#6b7280;margin-top:2px">My house is big.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:11px;padding:.7rem 1rem;display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:baseline;border:1.5px solid #e9d5ff;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(124,58,237,.07)">
    <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250;font-size:.96rem;min-width:24px">5.</span>
    <div>
      <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250">Mein Handy ist neu.</span>
      <span style="margin-left:.6rem;font-size:.8rem;color:#10b981;font-weight:700;background:#ecfdf5;border-radius:5px;padding:1px 7px">das Handy</span>
      <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#6b7280;margin-top:2px">My mobile phone is new.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:11px;padding:.7rem 1rem;display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:baseline;border:1.5px solid #e9d5ff;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(124,58,237,.07)">
    <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250;font-size:.96rem;min-width:24px">6.</span>
    <div>
      <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250">Unser Deutschkurs ist am Donnerstag.</span>
      <span style="margin-left:.6rem;font-size:.8rem;color:#3b82f6;font-weight:700;background:#eff6ff;border-radius:5px;padding:1px 7px">der Deutschkurs</span>
      <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#6b7280;margin-top:2px">Our German course is on Thursday.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:11px;padding:.7rem 1rem;display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:baseline;border:1.5px solid #e9d5ff;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(124,58,237,.07)">
    <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250;font-size:.96rem;min-width:24px">7.</span>
    <div>
      <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250">Mein Kind ist fünf Jahre alt.</span>
      <span style="margin-left:.6rem;font-size:.8rem;color:#10b981;font-weight:700;background:#ecfdf5;border-radius:5px;padding:1px 7px">das Kind</span>
      <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#6b7280;margin-top:2px">My child is five years old.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:11px;padding:.7rem 1rem;display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:baseline;border:1.5px solid #e9d5ff;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(124,58,237,.07)">
    <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250;font-size:.96rem;min-width:24px">8.</span>
    <div>
      <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250">Sein Auto ist neu.</span>
      <span style="margin-left:.6rem;font-size:.8rem;color:#10b981;font-weight:700;background:#ecfdf5;border-radius:5px;padding:1px 7px">das Auto</span>
      <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#6b7280;margin-top:2px">His car is new.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:11px;padding:.7rem 1rem;display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:baseline;border:1.5px solid #e9d5ff;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(124,58,237,.07)">
    <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250;font-size:.96rem;min-width:24px">9.</span>
    <div>
      <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250">Eure Kinder sind sehr gut.</span>
      <span style="margin-left:.6rem;font-size:.8rem;color:#374151;font-weight:700;background:#f3f4f6;border-radius:5px;padding:1px 7px">die Kinder (pl.)</span>
      <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#6b7280;margin-top:2px">Your (plural) children are very good.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:11px;padding:.7rem 1rem;display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:baseline;border:1.5px solid #e9d5ff;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(124,58,237,.07)">
    <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250;font-size:.96rem;min-width:24px">10.</span>
    <div>
      <span style="font-weight:800;color:#2d2250">Ihr Computer ist alt.</span>
      <span style="margin-left:.6rem;font-size:.8rem;color:#3b82f6;font-weight:700;background:#eff6ff;border-radius:5px;padding:1px 7px">der Computer</span>
      <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#6b7280;margin-top:2px">Her / Their computer is old.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

:::


```{=html}
<div style="text-align:center;margin-top:3rem;padding:1.5rem;color:#9333ea;font-size:.9rem;">
  <a href="../index.html" style="color:#7c3aed;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none">← Back to All Topics</a>
  &nbsp;·&nbsp; <em>Viel Erfolg!</em> (Good luck!)
</div>
</div><!-- /main-content -->
```
